tagline: Honest HVAC for Sonoma County since 2008
seoDescription: Atlas Heating and Air Conditioning is a family-run Santa Rosa HVAC contractor offering honest heating, AC, and mini-split service across Sonoma County.
heroHeading: Santa Rosa's straight-shooting heating and cooling team
heroSubheading: Owner Ryan Gordon and his crew have kept Sonoma County homes comfortable since 2008 with honest diagnostics and fair pricing.
aboutHeading: About Atlas Heating and Air Conditioning
aboutBody: Atlas Heating and Air Conditioning is a small, family-oriented company founded in Santa Rosa in 2008 by owner Ryan Gordon. From the shop on Silva Avenue, the team serves homeowners and businesses across Sonoma County and the surrounding North Bay.

Customers consistently point to the same thing: honest assessments and fair pricing. Atlas is known for recommending the right repair instead of pushing a full replacement, and for leaving the job site cleaner than they found it. The company holds a BBB A+ rating and carries a current California contractor's license (#917129).

services.title: Heating Repair & Installation
services.description: Furnace and heating system service, repair, and new installations, including dual-zone setups.

services.title: Air Conditioning
services.description: AC installation and repair to keep your home comfortable through Sonoma County summers.

services.title: Ductless Mini-Splits
services.description: Local Trane and Daikin dealer specializing in efficient ductless mini-split systems.

services.title: Water Heaters
services.description: Installation of both tank and tankless water heaters.

services.title: Maintenance & Diagnostics
services.description: Preventive maintenance and thorough diagnostic assessments with clear, detailed findings.

testimonials.quote: Ryan went above and beyond in service, even added some things not in the quote.
testimonials.author: Richard I.

testimonials.quote: Ryan and his team are amazing!
testimonials.author: Ryan G.

notes: VERIFIED OPEN and active (BBB A+, current CSLB license #917129, recent 2023 reviews). The outreach site URL (atlasheatingandairconditioninginc.com) was UNREACHABLE during research; the company's working web presence is heatingservicesantarosa.com (also refused direct connection). Established Feb 2008, owner Ryan Gordon, office manager Stacey Searles. NOTE: a separate, much older 'Atlas Heating & Ventilating' (est. 1908, SF/Oakland) is a DIFFERENT company — not this one. Rating cross-checked: Yelp 38 reviews, Yahoo/Yelp 5.0 of ~40, Angi 5.0, BBB A+. No verified first-party photos obtainable (Yelp 403, site down) so realPhotoUrls left empty.
